message:
chore: add beads sync artifacts to gitignore

Ignore transient beads sync files:
- .beads/.sync.lock: Sync lock file
- .beads/sync_base.jsonl: Sync baseline for diff

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
